name: Orphebull the Harmonious Bullfighter Bard
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>渾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>然</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぜん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>たる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>闘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>牛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>詩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－オルフェブル
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 2 LIGHT and 2 DARK monsters from your hand and/or GY, except this card. If Summoned this way, this card gains 1000 ATK for each monster banished from your hand for its Summon, and can attack monsters a number of times each Battle Phase up to the number of monsters banished from the GY for its Summon. If this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle, after damage calculation: You can banish that opponent's monster.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 2 LIGHT and 2 DARK monsters from your hand and/or GY, except this card. If Summoned this way, this card gains 1000 ATK for each monster banished from your hand for its Summon, and can attack monsters a number of times each Battle Phase up to the number of monsters banished from the GY for its Summon. If this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle, after damage calculation: You can banish that opponent's monster.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 2 LIGHT and 2 DARK monsters from your hand and/or GY, except this card. If Summoned this way, this card gains 1000 ATK for each monster banished from your hand for its Summon, and can attack monsters a number of times each Battle Phase up to the number of monsters banished from the GY for its Summon. If this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle, after damage calculation: You can banish that opponent's monster.

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Continuous, Trigger
action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
attack: Can make multiple attacks on monsters
banished: Banishes battling monster after damage calculation
